title: scutellaria sevanensis
intro: Scutellaria sevanensis, also known as Sevan skullcap, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and protecting against oxidative damage. In herbal preparations, Scutellaria sevanensis is often used as a tincture, tea, or infusion, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
